name: NovaStore
releaseNotes: Final hardened restore of NovaStore v0.1.4-style app installs/updates. Adds REQUEST_INSTALL_PACKAGES while staying release-signed and non-debuggable, with no boot or notification permission, no broad package query, and no install-session API. Keeps ACTION_VIEW + APK MIME + FileProvider + explicit installer target + ClipData handoff. Uses jsDelivr signed catalog URLs first, then falls back to GitHub Contents API and raw GitHub if the CDN is stale or unavailable; stale signed self-catalogs are skipped.
